Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S extends SourceElement>

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<S>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn, IExecutionMethodReturn
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractExecutionMethodReturn, ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn
public interface IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S extends SourceElement> extends IExecutionNode<S>
Defines the common interface of IExecutionMethodReturn and IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn.

    Returns the variable value pairs of the state when the method has been called.

      Returns the condition under which this method return is reached from the calling IExecutionMethodCall.
